day name: The Transfer of the Relics of the Holy Unmercenaries Cyrus and John
name: Cyrus and John
troparia: (Tone 5) O Christ God, through the wonders of your holy martyrs,* You have given us an invincible rampart.* By their prayers disperse the council of unbelievers;* strengthen the rule of your kingdom,* for You alone are good and the Lover of mankind.
kontakia: (Tone 3) After receiving the divine gift of healing, O holy ones,* you ceaselessly work wonders in the world* and invisibly remove all our sufferings by the art of your hands.* O Cyrus, filled with God’s wisdom, and O glorious John,* you are truly divine healers.
